title: UltimaMod
description: Just some ABSOLUTELY OP items (armour, sword, potions)... I really hope you enjoy playing my first mod :)
body:
####  My mod made for your fun. 
 Made for playing with OP items. Adds those OP items: (UltimaArmour and UltimaSword, UltimaPotion, UltimaEffectPotion, AntiUltimaEffectPotion, Ultimatite). For now the mod is (basically) only for creative (in survival, only Ultimatite generation and achivement for placing Ultimatite are here). This mod is already somewhat fun to play using creative mode, but it is still in very early development. Do not expect much from that mod for now. It will be updated A LOT and (probably) ported to fabric.
####                                                                                                     Answering some questions: 
#### 1)Why there is no UltimaMod 1.0.0 pre-alpha and UltimaMod 1.0.1 pre-alpha???
I dont have UltimaMod 1.0.0 pre-alpha or UltimaMod 1.0.1 pre-alpha, sorry about that. That is because i never exported them.
#### 2)Why are changelogs not available for all the versions???
 I only have changelogs for 1.0.1 pre-alpha, 1.0.2 pre-alpha, 1.0.6 pre-alpha and 1.1.6 pre-alpha or later. They are not available for all the versions because i only started to actually write down the changelogs since 1.1.6 pre-alpha.
 #### 3)How often will the mod get updated?
 A few times a week for the first couple of weeks at least. Then the updates will slow down to about 1 update a week. You can expect some slowdowns but overall it will be true.
#### 4)Will the mod get ported to newer Minecraft versions???
Short answer: Yes, it will. Long answer: It will but not for now. I will try to make the mod actually good first.
